auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Formcarry API key passed with the api_key request header. Copy it from the Integrations page in your Formcarry dashboard: https://app.formcarry.com/integrations.

actions.name: create_form
actions.description: Create a new Formcarry form with basic notification, redirect, and storage settings.

email.description: Comma-separated email addresses that should receive submission notifications.

returnUrl.description: URL to redirect users to after a successful submission when not using the built-in thank-you page.

failUrl.description: URL to redirect users to after a failed submission when returnUrl is configured.

returnParams.description: Whether Formcarry should append submission data to the returnUrl query string.

googleRecaptcha.description: Google reCAPTCHA secret key used to enable spam protection for the form.

webhook.description: Webhook URL that Formcarry should call with a POST request for each submission.

retention.description: Whether Formcarry should save incoming submissions to its database.

inputSchema.description: Basic Formcarry form settings supported by the first provider pass.

code.description: Numeric status code returned by Formcarry.

formUrl.description: Hosted Formcarry form URL created for the new form.

outputSchema.description: Successful response returned after creating a Formcarry form.

actions.name: delete_form
actions.description: Delete an existing Formcarry form by ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for deleting a Formcarry form.

code.description: Numeric status code returned by Formcarry.

outputSchema.description: Base success payload returned by Formcarry form mutation endpoints.

actions.name: list_submissions
actions.description: List submissions for a Formcarry form with the documented pagination, sorting, and filtering query parameters.

form_id.description: Formcarry form ID whose submissions should be retrieved.

limit.description: Maximum number of submissions to return. Formcarry documents a maximum of 50.

sort.description: Sorting criteria in the format field:order, such as createdAt:-1 or createdAt:1.

filter.description: Comma-separated filter expressions in the format key:value, including documented filters like date:7, attachments:true, or spam:false.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters accepted by the Formcarry submissions endpoint.

form.description: Form ID whose submissions were requested.

results.description: Number of submissions returned in the current response.

form.description: Form ID associated with the submission.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the submission was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the submission was last updated.

items.description: Submission field entry returned by Formcarry.

fields.description: Field values captured in the submission.

anyOf.description: Previous page number, or null when unavailable.
Next page number, or null when unavailable.

total_submissions.description: Total number of submissions available for the form.

outputSchema.description: Submission list response returned by Formcarry.
